mapper.select: SELECT t.FEntryID, t.FID, t.F_khhh, t.F_sfbg, t.FCustMatID, t.FCustMatName, t.FMaterialID, t.FMaterialName, t.FMateriaModel, t.F_cty_BaseProperty1, t.FMustQty, t.FRealQty, t.FPrice, t.FTaxPrice, t.FIsFree, t.FLot, t.FSoorDerno, t.F_cghth, t.FAllAmount, t.FStockID, t.FStockStatusID, t.FQualifyType, t.FMtoNo, t.FEntrynote, t.FSumReceivedAMT, t.F_c, t.F_k, t.F_g, t.F_tj, t.F_mz, t.F_jz, t.F_mzz, t.F_xs, t.F_zxs, t.F_gys, t.F_cgdj, t.F_cgzj, t.F_jdj, t.F_jdzj, t.F_fpdj, t.F_fpzj, t.F_zwbgpm, t.F_ywbgpm, t.F_bgsl, t.F_BGZT, t.F_HYJSSL, t.F_ddhsdj, t.F_tsl, t.Fddshrq, t.Fckzq, t.Fzdrq, t.Fbcgctg, t.Fbcykc, t.Fypd, t.F_PEUU_BaseProperty_83g, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_kd_sales_stockout_entry t WHERE t.FID = #{fid} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_kd_sales_stockout_entry ( FEntryID, FID, F_khhh, F_sfbg, FCustMatID, FCustMatName, FMaterialID, FMaterialName, FMateriaModel, F_cty_BaseProperty1, FMustQty, FRealQty, FPrice, FTaxPrice, FIsFree, FLot, FSoorDerno, F_cghth, FAllAmount, FStockID, FStockStatusID, FQualifyType, FMtoNo, FEntrynote, FSumReceivedAMT, F_c, F_k, F_g, F_tj, F_mz, F_jz, F_mzz, F_xs, F_zxs, F_gys, F_cgdj, F_cgzj, F_jdj, F_jdzj, F_fpdj, F_fpzj, F_zwbgpm, F_ywbgpm, F_bgsl, F_BGZT, F_HYJSSL, F_ddhsdj, F_tsl, Fddshrq, Fckzq, Fzdrq, Fbcgctg, Fbcykc, Fypd, F_PEUU_BaseProperty_83g, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.fentryID}, #{item.fid}, #{item.fKhhh}, #{item.fSfbg}, #{item.fCustMatID}, #{item.fCustMatName}, #{item.fMaterialID}, #{item.fMaterialName}, #{item.fMateriaModel}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty1}, #{item.fMustQty}, #{item.fRealQty}, #{item.fPrice}, #{item.fTaxPrice}, #{item.fIsFree}, #{item.fLot}, #{item.fSoorDerno}, #{item.fCghth}, #{item.fAllAmount}, #{item.fStockID}, #{item.fStockStatusID}, #{item.fQualifyType}, #{item.fMtoNo}, #{item.fEntrynote}, #{item.fSumReceivedAMT}, #{item.fC}, #{item.fK}, #{item.fG}, #{item.fTj}, #{item.fMz}, #{item.fJz}, #{item.fMzz}, #{item.fXs}, #{item.fZxs}, #{item.fGys}, #{item.fCgdj}, #{item.fCgzj}, #{item.fJdj}, #{item.fJdzj}, #{item.fFpdj}, #{item.fFpzj}, #{item.fZwbgpm}, #{item.fYwbgpm}, #{item.fBgsl}, #{item.fBGZT}, #{item.fHYJSSL}, #{item.fDdhsdj}, #{item.fTsl}, #{item.fddshrq}, #{item.fckzq}, #{item.fzdrq}, #{item.fbcgctg}, #{item.fbcykc}, #{item.fypd}, #{item.fPEUUBaseProperty83g}, NOW(), NOW() )
